hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm -rf /|git push.*--force.*main|git reset --hard'; then echo 'Blocked: destructive command on main' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
